welcome.title: Welcome to Bookmark
welcome.subtitle: Your personal library for audiobooks, ebooks, and comics — beautifully organized and always in sync.
welcome.intro: Let's point Bookmark at the media on your server. It only takes a minute.

libraries.title: Add your libraries
libraries.subtitle: Choose the folders on your server where your media lives. You can add or change these anytime.
libraries.audiobooksDescription: Point to a folder of audiobooks (M4B, MP3, and more).
libraries.ebooksDescription: Point to a folder of ebooks (EPUB, PDF, and more).
libraries.comicsDescription: Point to a folder of comics (CBZ, CBR, PDF).
libraries.scanHint: Bookmark scans these folders automatically and keeps watching for new files.

done.title: You're all set!
done.subtitleScanning: Bookmark is scanning your folders now — your books will start appearing on the home screen shortly.
done.subtitleEmpty: You haven't added any libraries yet. You can add them anytime from Settings.

waiting.title: Your library is being set up
waiting.description: An administrator is getting things ready. Check back soon — your audiobooks, ebooks, and comics will appear here.

resume.title: Finish setting up your library
resume.description: Add your audiobooks, ebooks, or comics to get started.

continueListening.title: Continue Listening
continueListening.emptyDescription: Pick an audiobook from your library to begin listening.
continueListening.noLibraryAdminDescription: Configure your audiobook library in settings to get started.
continueListening.noLibraryUserDescription: The audiobook library hasn't been configured yet. Please contact an administrator.

continueReading.title: Continue Reading
continueReading.emptyDescription: Pick an ebook from your library to begin reading.
continueReading.noLibraryAdminDescription: Configure your ebook library in settings to get started.
continueReading.noLibraryUserDescription: The ebook library hasn't been configured yet. Please contact an administrator.
